reviews.comment:
Fantástico establecimiento pero demoras insoportables en los surtidores ahuyentan a muchos como yo,  que he llegado a esperar hasta media hora por no estar todos los surtidores funcionando. Y eso porqué  si somos todos socios ?

(Translated by Google)
Fantastic establishment, but the unbearable delays at the pumps drive away many, like me, who have waited up to half an hour because not all the pumps were working. And why is that if we're all members?
